title: AVG Bundle (Verwerker / Consent / DPIA)
description: Operator-importable bundle of the three AVG-related object types that intentionally live as schemas (configurable from the operator UI) rather than hardcoded tables. Verwerker captures third-party processor agreements (Art 28 verwerkersovereenkomst). Consent is the granular per-subject opt-in/opt-out ledger (Art 6(1)(a) + Art 7). DPIA is the Data Protection Impact Assessment shape (Art 35). Each schema carries x-openregister-processing-activity so writes are correctly tagged on the audit trail.

registers.title: AVG (Verwerker / Consent / DPIA)
registers.description: Bundle register holding AVG-related object types that operators manage through the standard schema/object UI. Pairs with the dedicated `oc_openregister_verwerkingsactiviteiten` catalog table — schemas here describe operational records (signed processor agreements, consent grants, DPIA assessments) rather than the static processing-activity catalog itself.

verwerker.title: Verwerker
verwerker.description: Third-party data processor (verwerker per AVG Art 28). One row captures a single processor + the operator's signed verwerkersovereenkomst with them. Sub-processors (sub-verwerkers) are referenced via the subVerwerkers property.

kvk.title: KVK-nummer
kvk.description: KVK-nummer (8 cijfers) als de verwerker een NL-rechtspersoon is

verwerkersovereenkomstUrl.title: Verwerkersovereenkomst
verwerkersovereenkomstUrl.description: URL naar de getekende verwerkersovereenkomst (DocuDesk / contract management)

consent.title: Consent
consent.description: Per-subject consent ledger entry (AVG Art 6(1)(a) + Art 7). Each row records a single act of consent: who, for which processing activity, when granted, when withdrawn (if applicable), and the source channel through which the operator obtained it.

subjectId.title: Subject identifier
subjectId.description: Identifier of the data subject (BSN, email, user uuid). Pair with subjectType to disambiguate.

subjectType.title: Subject identifier type
subjectType.description: Identifier domain — drives which downstream system can resolve the subject.

processingActivityId.title: Verwerkingsactiviteit
processingActivityId.description: UUID of the verwerkingsactiviteit (in oc_openregister_verwerkingsactiviteiten) this consent applies to.

purpose.title: Purpose / doelbinding
purpose.description: Specific purpose the subject consented to (may refine the broader doelbinding of the linked verwerkingsactiviteit).

withdrawnAt.title: Withdrawn at
withdrawnAt.description: Set when the subject withdraws consent (Art 7(3)).

source.title: Source
source.description: Channel through which consent was captured.

evidenceUrl.title: Evidence URL
evidenceUrl.description: Optional link to a stored evidence artefact (signed PDF, screenshot, recording).

dpia.title: DPIA (Data Protection Impact Assessment)
dpia.description: AVG Art 35 Data Protection Impact Assessment. Operators run a DPIA when a processing activity is likely to result in a high risk to data subjects. One DPIA row per assessed verwerkingsactiviteit; identifiedRisks + mitigations are nested arrays so the full assessment lives in a single object.

processingActivityId.title: Verwerkingsactiviteit
processingActivityId.description: UUID of the verwerkingsactiviteit being assessed.

assessor.title: Assessor
assessor.description: Name + role of the person who performed the DPIA

dpoConsulted.title: DPO consulted?
dpoConsulted.description: Art 35(2) — DPIA MUST be carried out with the advice of the DPO when one is designated.

priorConsultationRequired.title: Prior consultation required?
priorConsultationRequired.description: Art 36 — when residual risk remains high, the AP MUST be consulted before processing starts.

documentUrl.title: DPIA document URL
documentUrl.description: Link to the full DPIA document (often in DocuDesk)
